configFiles.description: Maps Simple Clouds cloud type ids to allowed dimensions.

entries.default: Cloud type -> allowed dimensions. Defaults to minecraft:overworld.
entries.description: Generated comment field. Optional and informational.
entries.example: Cloud type -> allowed dimensions. Defaults to minecraft:overworld.

entries.allowedValues: Valid dimension resource locations such as minecraft:overworld or minecraft:the_nether
entries.description: Allowed dimensions for a given Simple Clouds cloud type id. If the key is missing, invalid, or empty, source code falls back to minecraft:overworld.
